configuration.properties.showSymbolsInOu:
[Experimental Feature] Show Symbol Definitions Within a Document.
Allow the user to show in outline panel and quickly navigate to any symbol definition in the document.
configuration.properties.showEnableDisab:
[Experimental Feature] Enable and disable the symbols to display. 
This option requires Show Symbols In Outline Panel to be enabled.
configuration.properties.outline.maxFile: Above this UTF-8 byte size, Outline scans only the beginning of the file and shows a truncation symbol.
configuration.properties.diagnostics.all: Allow non-contiguous subnet masks. ACL and NX-OS wildcard masks and route-match masks are unaffected.
configuration.properties.diagnostics.ena:
[Experimental Feature] Enable Cisco configuration Diagnostics.

Diagnostics checks these supported scopes:
- IPv4 routes, interface addresses, and prefix lists
- IPv6 addresses, prefix lists, and ACL prefixes
- IPv4 ACL wildcard masks
- IOS and NX-OS network object-groups

Complete 'no ...' forms of supported commands are validated with the same rules.
